urban_context.zoning_constraints: Sky exposure plane compliance, solar envelope shadow restrictions, strict riverfront setback boundaries
urban_context.project_origin: Inverting a rigid industrial warehouse residue site into an organic, cloud-like high-density hybrid ecosystem

tectonic_systems.structure: High-Strength Self-Compacting Concrete (SCC) core with post-tensioned reinforced concrete slabs and embedded steel-reinforced concrete (SRC) beams
tectonic_systems.facade: Unitized curtain wall with Low-E multi-layered double glazing doors, wrapped in precision stamped stainless steel cladding shingles
tectonic_systems.environmental_tech: Natural chimney stack effect lightwells, passive thermodynamic self-shading sloped balconies, horizontal skybridge network parks, high-durability thermal break insulation pads

stage_2_knowledge_structure.site_context: Sutures a highly fractured waterfront industrial node split by active transport infrastructures. Inverts a negative gray site into a continuous vertical ecosystem mirroring Shanshui City philosophy.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.scale_and_geometry: Employs an intense 3D Boolean subtraction on a regular fluid volume, fracturing the exterior skin into room-sized modular pixelated massing options that breakup the 146m tall skyline.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.user_sociology: Expands high-altitude occupant privacy and territorial safety via responsive perimeter frames, while implementing a strict rooftop public amenity open mechanism across the horizontal skybridge long corridor.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.lifecycle_events: Defies permanent high-altitude seismic and wind torque loads on massive overhanging decks by pre-fabricating unitized metal shingles and utilizing heavy lifting construction techniques for the steel sky bridges.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.performance_physics: The fluid sloped organic towers act as an aerodynamic wind-attenuation envelope that limits corner street gusts, while the deep pixelated overhang offsets eliminate summer solar heat tracks.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 2. 幾何與形式生成 (Geometry & Form Generation)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Fractures the rigid monolithic skyscraper typology into room-scaled organic boxes. This volumetric fragmentation effectively dissolves the skyline oppression while generating unique dynamic geometric light tracks and optimizing natural daylighting.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The visual data tracks distinct, rugged protrusion and recession of custom modular balcony pixel boxes lining the main faces of the towers.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 3. 都市邊界與交通導向 (Zoning, Context & TOD)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Abolishes the isolation of high-rise vertical islands by projecting a massive horizontal steel truss skybridge network at levels 24-26. This layout weaves three detached towers into a multi-tiered public town matrix, breaking vertical isolation.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The building cross-section highlights the horizontal translucent connector bar linking the structural paths of the three sloped towers across the high skyline.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 2. 幾何與形式生成 (Geometry & Form Generation)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Projects heavy unbraced room-sized concrete modules up to 6.5 meters outward into the public open sky. Transfers critical asymmetric rotation moments back to concrete shear wall structures by embedding heavy SRC conversion beams inside the floor plates.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The layout blueprint charts modular balcony units projecting significantly beyond the standard flat envelope lines, configured in an adaptive non-repeating grid layout.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 5. 空間行為學與公共利益 (Behavioral Realm & Public Benefit)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Revitalizes traditional low-rise courtyard terrace living at a high altitude. Incorporating fully flush concealed window track sub-joints matches the interior premium flooring finish lines with the external timber decks seamlessly.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The detailed blueprint section captures the flush tracking joint profile crossing the external envelope boundary line without any vertical physical threshold changes.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 4. 構造、材料與工程實務 (Tectonics, Materials & Construction)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Eliminates interior partition columns by treating the external precast concrete modular frame grid as the primary load-bearing exoskeleton. The raw structure functions directly as the finish facade, preserving absolute tectonic honesty.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The layout shows a column-free domestic interior surrounding the central core; all vertical gravity loads align perfectly with the thick external pixel load-bearing walls.

stage_3_ontology_mapping.category: 6. 數位孿生與智能化運算 (Digital Twin & Smart Building)
stage_3_ontology_mapping.causal_dialectic: Absent by intent. The building relies on robust, permanent passive material profiles, deep pixel self-shading geometry, and static solar angle parameters rather than motorized active IoT responsive shutters or dynamic electronic glazing networks.

graphic_evidence_alignment.reason_of_gap: Tectonic design ideology. The execution prioritized material durability, structural honesty, and architectural passive response over complex high-maintenance electromechanical motorized kinetics, omitting automated cabling telemetry drawings.
